title: BIL30 — Bill 30 (Robotron, SPNSND-based)
tldr: GWAVE preset using `SPNSND` (the spinner-pattern table). Long, sustained tone used for in-game alerts.
how: GWAVE preset `FCB $03, $15, $11, $FF, $00, 13, SPNSND-GFRTAB`. The 13-iteration echo count + SPNSND pattern produces a sustained alert-like tone.
watch: GWAVE engine view's `GECNT` counting through 13 echoes.
